project.name: Sample Structure
project.description: Seed project for a Tekla-like JSON model database. It stores project structure, grids, levels, assemblies, physical objects, BIM metadata, and connection data. It does not store meshes.

cz_connection_1.name: Beam 1 to column 1 end plate zone

bim.name: Beam B1
bim.description: Secondary steel beam framing into column_1 with welded end plate.

bim.name: Top Front Stiffener P2A
bim.description: Top front continuity stiffener plate inside column_1. It stops clear of the column web.

bim.name: Top Back Stiffener P2B
bim.description: Top back continuity stiffener plate inside column_1. It stops clear of the column web.

bim.name: Bottom Front Stiffener P3A
bim.description: Bottom front continuity stiffener plate inside column_1. It stops clear of the column web.

bim.name: Bottom Back Stiffener P3B
bim.description: Bottom back continuity stiffener plate inside column_1. It stops clear of the column web.

bim.name: Haunch Plate P4
bim.description: Sloped underside plate approximating the triangular haunch from the reference image.

bim.name: Beam End Stiffener P5A
bim.description: Left end stiffener plate at the far end of beam_1.

bim.name: Beam End Stiffener P5B
bim.description: Right end stiffener plate at the far end of beam_1.

bim.name: Fastener Group 1
bim.description: Eight M16 fasteners connecting end_plate_1 to column_1.

bim.name: Beam To End Plate Weld
bim.description: All-around fillet weld between the beam start and end_plate_1.

authoring.notes: Preset provenance only; detachedObjectIds contain source-of-truth geometry.

bim.name: End Plate Connection 1
bim.description: Beam-to-column end plate connection between beam_1 and column_1.

migrationHistory.description: Renamed generic patterns to holePatterns, added objectPatterns/authoring provenance, fabrication marks, tolerances, and connection/frame library refs.
